description: The Global Atmosphere 9 configuration of the Unified Model.  The main new developments in this configuration are: - The introduction of a prognostic-based convective entrainment rate (Willet et al., submitted). - Alignment of mid- and deep-level convection (with deep convection subsequently switched off). - A new parameterisation for riming (Furtado et al., 2017). - Bimodal cloud initiation (Weverberg et al., 2021a, b). - Several changes to improve the large-scale circulation (Williams et al., 2020).
references: "The Met Office Unified Model Global Atmosphere and Land 9.0 configuration" (Willet et al. in prep)
